element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Player controls Jackie Chan and brawls against enemies throughout all levels
Frogs must be hit to obtain power-ups or rice bowls (health restoration); player can only carry one power-up type at a time
Special beam-like attack usable up to 5 times per life; recharges when collecting 30 green orbs
Most defeated enemies drop green orbs; 30 orbs restore one health point and reset charged shots to 5
Bells transport Jackie to timed bonus stages (30-second limit); involve cloud jumping or statue hitting for points to purchase lives and special attacks
One boss at end of each of the 5 levels; mastery of all preceding mechanics required

typical_relief_triggers: Defeating enemy groups and collecting green orbs
Finding rice bowls to restore health
Accessing bonus stages for extra lives
Charging beam attacks for special offense
typical_tension_triggers: Health depletion without nearby rice bowls
Limited power-up availability (one at a time)
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Wave-based enemy encounters punctuated by resource collection moments; escalating pressure toward boss fights at level ends

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Bells hidden throughout levels trigger optional bonus stages

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduction to basic combat, melee attacks, and enemy patterns in Level 1
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Integration of charged beam attacks, power-up management, and increased enemy density in Levels 2-3
difficulty_curve.late_game: Mastery of all mechanics with multiple enemy types, limited resources, and challenging boss encounters in Levels 4-5
notable_spikes: Boss encounters at end of each level require full mechanical mastery
Limited continues system (5 initial continues) creates resource scarcity pressure

notable_level_patterns.description: Levels structured around successive enemy encounters with resource collection opportunities between waves
Each of 5 levels culminates in a boss fight; escalating difficulty across the game
Bell-triggered 30-second timed bonus stages break main level flow and provide life/attack resources
Single life system with continues, power-up carrying limit (1), and orb collection threshold (30) creates constant resource management tension
